login.title: Flukee
login.subtitle: Welcome to your sacred space
login.gentleReminder: Please enter your email and password.
login.checkCredentials: Please check your credentials and try again.
login.inviteHowTo: Create an account with a password, sign in if you already have one, or use Google with the same email as this invite.
login.fillNamePassword: Please enter your name and password.
login.googleSameEmail: With Google, use the same email address as on this invitation.

coach.shareLinkBelow: You can also share this link if email does not arrive:
coach.traineeAdded: {{name}} has been added to your clients

dashboard.whenClientsAssigned: When clients are assigned to you, they'll appear here.
dashboard.emptyStateMessage: Your coach will add reflection tasks and practices here. When they arrive, you'll find them in this calm space.

tasks.noPracticesInTimeline: No practices in the timeline yet.
tasks.createPracticeSubtitle: Send a gentle practice for your client to explore.
tasks.reflectionDesc: A written reflection or journal prompt
tasks.readDesc: A document or resource to review
tasks.title: Title
tasks.placeholderDescription: A brief context for this practice...
tasks.placeholderPrompt: What would you like them to reflect on? Take your time...
tasks.uploadOrLinkRequired: Please upload a document or paste a link.
tasks.shareBeforeSubmit: Please share your thoughts before submitting.
tasks.questionnaireComingSoonAlert: Questionnaire responses will be available soon.
tasks.failedToSubmit: Failed to submit. Please try again.
tasks.readDocumentInstruction: Read the document above at your own pace. When you're ready, mark it as complete below.
tasks.placeholderReflection: Take your time. Share what feels right...

messages.subtitle: A calm space for connection with your clients.
messages.sendToStart: Send a gentle message to start.
messages.selectClient: Select a client to view your conversation
messages.guideAwaitsMessage: Once you're connected with a coach, you'll have a sacred space here for reflection and support.
messages.beginConversationMessage: Send a gentle message to your coach. This space is for reflection, guidance, and support.
